_description: Canonical JSON schemas for release strategy decision meeting.

points: one concise observation about perception, messaging, or risk — max 3 bullets
what you agree with and why — max 3 bullets

changes.requirement: what must change in the messaging or approach
changes.justification: why it matters — describe the perception risk

DISAGREE.blocker_description: what messaging or approach is dangerous and why
required_changes: concrete action to fix the risk

release_plan.what_we_built: honest description of the multi-agent simulation capability
release_plan.value_proposition: why sharing this benefits the company
release_plan.proposed_audience: who should see this first and why
release_plan.messaging_strategy: how to frame this as augmentation not replacement
release_plan.rollout_approach: staged plan for introducing the work

if_we_share: positive outcomes of releasing — recognition, culture, collaboration
if_we_do_nothing: cost of inaction — work stays invisible, morale, missed opportunities

future_vision: where this capability goes in 6-12 months — meeting prep, proposal stress-testing, onboarding, customer feedback simulation
release_plan.authors_recommendation: your personal recommended approach with reasoning — not just options, but what you believe we should do and why

what_it_proved: concrete results from actual runs — real insights surfaced, real concerns identified
known_limitations: honest assessment of what doesn't work yet — circular arguments, synthesis failures, model constraints

updated_release_plan.authors_recommendation: updated personal recommendation incorporating all feedback

safeguards_added: concrete guardrail added to the plan
concerns_acknowledged: fear or risk that was validated
unresolved_risks: risk that remains open and proposed mitigation

risks_accepted: risks we are choosing to accept
conditions: requirement that must be met before release — only for CONDITIONAL
recommended_messaging: specific language or framing to use

MEETING_NOTES.executive_summary: 2-3 sentence summary of the discussion and decision
key_concerns: major fear or risk raised during discussion
decisions: concrete decision made during the meeting

risk_register.mitigation: how to prevent or handle it

FINAL_REVIEW.overall_assessment: 2-3 sentence verdict on the meeting outcome quality
FINAL_REVIEW.decision_quality: Was the final decision sound? Is it appropriately cautious or too conservative? Be opinionated.

process_quality.facilitator_effectiveness: Did the facilitator manage flow well? Were silent agents drawn out? Were spirals caught?
process_quality.discussion_balance: Was the discussion balanced between risk and opportunity? Any echo chamber effects?

strengths: specific thing the group got right — cite agent names and turn numbers
blind_spots: specific scenario, edge case, or consideration the group missed entirely
FINAL_REVIEW.meta_observations: Recursive or self-referential patterns. Does the meeting's own process serve as evidence for/against its topic? Any ironic dynamics?

recommendations.action: specific, actionable improvement — consolidate related items, max 4 total

FINAL_REVIEW.confidence_score: 1-10 rating of how robust this decision is (10 = highly confident, ready to execute)
FINAL_REVIEW.confidence_gap: What specific actions would raise the confidence score by 1-2 points?
